chain_edges.notes: Agent-in-the-loop secret exfiltration via CI generalizes to OAuth-mediated AI-SaaS exfiltration; same threat class, broader surface.
Indirect prompt injection trend feeds OAuth-trust risk: AI integrations become privileged execution paths admins must scope down.
Agent Registry's tool-permissions/audit-trace standardization motivates SSO carving an AI-extension OAuth scope.

relations.notes: Both name a new agent/AI-integration security category; CI-secret leak vs OAuth-scoped SaaS pivot are independent facets.
Indirect prompt injection CVEs and OAuth-trust controls are adjacent enterprise AI-security strands.
Agent Registry permissions/audit and SSO AI-extension OAuth scope are complementary control planes for agent governance.
